out_of_scope_note: Open Review commentary on Kawakita et al. (2023) — a meta-discussion/peer commentary about philosophical claims regarding qualia and inter-subjective consciousness from similarity-structure analyses. The piece is a critical essay arguing that the target paper stipulates rather than tests its philosophical claims; it presents no new empirical data, no computational model of perception, and no circuit-level mechanism. Falls under the philosophy-of-consciousness synthesis / commentary exclusion.
